name: Crockpot Beer Spice Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter and brown sugar until light.
2. Beat in eggs.
3. Combine flour, baking powder, baking soda, salt, cinnamon, and allspice.
4. Add dry ingredients to creamed mixture alternately with beer, mixing until blended.
5. Stir in walnuts and raisins.
6. Place batter into a well-greased and floured 2-quart pudding mold.
7. Position the mold in the crockery part of the pot.
8. Cover the top of the mold with 4 or 5 layers of paper towels.
9. Place the lid loosely on the crockpot.
10. Cook on High for 3 1/2 hours in a 3-quart pot and 4 hours in a 4 1/2 quart size.
11. Cool on a rack for 10 minutes, then turn out onto a serving plate.
12. Serve warm with Hard Sauce or ice cream.
Makes 1 cake.
